abilities.name: Fade

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Disappear, move faster, and become invulnerable, but you cannot shoot.
raw.ability details: * Moira becomes [[invisible]] and [[phased out]], cleansing her of most negative [[status effect]]s and making her immune to damage. ** Moira can still be hit by [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]] and [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] while phased, however these will only lock her movement, and will not deal any damage or interrupt the ability. ** [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]] will prevent Fade from being activated, however she cannot be trapped by it during Fade. * Moira can still pick up [[Health Pack]]s during Fade. * While in Fade, Moira jumps higher than normal, reaching up to 4 meter height. * Can be used while ''Could not find 'Coalescence' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' is active. * Jump speed bonus stacks additively with base jump speed. * Fade's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Biotic Orb

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam
raw.official description: Launch a bouncing sphere that either heals nearby allies or damages nearby enemies.
raw.damage: 60 per second, up to 250
raw.heal: 75 per second, up to 300
raw.ability details:
* Bounces off walls and pierces heroes.
* The orb itself pierces [[barrier]]s, but does not target enemies or allies through them.
* Dealing damage with Biotic Orb restores a small amount of Biotic Energy.
* Damage Orb does not affect enemy [[objects]].
* If [[Damage amplification|amplified]], only the rate of damage/healing per second is increased, not the total amount.
* Bounces off of and destroys fences and other breakables.

abilities.name: Biotic Grasp

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam (projectile)
raw.official description: Hold to heal all allies in front of you. Consumes biotic energy.
raw.heal:
80 per second (impact)
17 per second (over time)
raw.ability details: * Causes a heal over time that begins upon the last impact of the spray healing. This allows Moira to heal without expending resources. * Passes through allies and enemies, but not enemy [[barrier]]s. * Line of sight blocked by terrain and terrain-like objects. * Like [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile, there is travel time for the spray to reach its destination. * Collision against map geometry and enemy barriers is pinpoint, much like Reinhardt's [[File:Ability-reinhardt4.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Fire Strike|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Fire Strike|Fire Strike]]. * Needs at least 8 biotic energy to activate. * Can destroy fences and other breakables.

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam (no target indicator, soft lock-on)
raw.official description: Long range beam weapon. Damage dealt heals you and replenishes your biotic energy.
raw.damage: 65 per second
raw.heal: 30 per second (self)
raw.ability details:
* Biotic Grasp has a 0.7 meter target acquisition radius against enemy heroes.
* Self-healing and damage are completely separate. Altering the damage does not affect the self heal.
* Generates 21.875 biotic energy per second. When combined with the passive regeneration, this becomes 25.715 biotic energy per second (or 16% per second).
**Spamming Biotic Grasp Increase the biotic energy regeneration faster than a continuous press.
* Alternating between Secondary Fire and Melee will help you eliminate targets faster.

damage.raw: 65 per second

heal.raw: 30 per second (self)

abilities.name: Coalescence

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam
raw.official description: Fire a beam that heals allies and damages enemies.
raw.damage: 85 per second
raw.heal:
140 per second (allies)
55 per second (self)
raw.ability details: * Passive Biotic Energy regen rate is increased by +200% during the ultimate. * Coalescence's healing has a miss forgiveness behavior: If no allied heroes are hit, the beam's healing will be increased by 50% for a short duration depending on how long it hasn't hit an ally for. ** This behavior does not affect the damage of Coalescence. ** Not hitting an ally means that no allied hero may be touching the beam in this time. For example, if a full HP ally is in the beam, they will still count as hit by it and the bonus will not apply when the beam starts healing. ** Hitting an enemy does not prevent the bonus from applying. * Moira can use [[File:Ability Moira Fade.png|sub|link=Moira#Fade|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Fade|Fade]] while channeling Coalescence. The beam will be temporarily disabled while in Fade. * Line of sight blocked by terrain and terrain-like objects. * Coalescence is a [[channeled]] ability; Moira cannot shoot or use abilities - other than Fade - and getting [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]] immediately ends the ability. * Moira's self-healing starts immediately upon activating Coalescence, this helps her to self-sustain. * Coalescence's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap. * Damage bonuses, such as Ana's [[Nano Boost]] , Mercy's [[Caduceus Staff]] and Juno's [[Orbital Ray]], will increase the damage dealt by coalescence but not the heal. * Heals or Damage are not increased if allies and enemies are touched by it at the same time.

damage.raw: 85 per second

heal.raw:
140 per second (allies)
55 per second (self)
